# 48 — Wiki Maintenance

**Status**: Active  
**Introduced**: Phase 175 (2026-07-01)  
**Implements**: OpenWiki pattern (reference not embed)  
**Tool**: `scripts/ai/aq-wiki`

---

## What the Wiki Is

`.understand-anything/wiki/` contains structured markdown sections derived from `knowledge-graph.json` (6,257 nodes, 1,870 edges). Each file covers one codebase subsystem.

The wiki is the O(1) entry point for architecture questions. Agents reference sections by path instead of scanning raw source files, saving 90%+ of context tokens for orientation tasks.

**This is NOT generated by LLM during wiki generation** — it aggregates pre-computed summaries from the knowledge graph nodes. No inference needed for `--init` or `--update`.

---

## Subsystem Sections

| Section | Path | Covers |
|---------|------|--------|
| `hybrid-coordinator` | `.understand-anything/wiki/hybrid-coordinator.md` | Request routing, intent classification, tool dispatch |
| `switchboard` | `.understand-anything/wiki/switchboard.md` | Profile routing, circuit breakers, delegation |
| `local-agent` | `.understand-anything/wiki/local-agent.md` | Qwen3-35B runtime, outer loop, task state |
| `agent-runtimes` | `.understand-anything/wiki/agent-runtimes.md` | Slot scheduling, SlotWaitTimeout, local_agent_runtime |
| `aidb` | `.understand-anything/wiki/aidb.md` | AIDB RAG server, Qdrant collections, ingestion |
| `nix-modules` | `.understand-anything/wiki/nix-modules.md` | NixOS module declarations, options SSOT |
| `nix-hosts` | `.understand-anything/wiki/nix-hosts.md` | Per-host config, deploy options, SOPS wiring |
| `ai-scripts` | `.understand-anything/wiki/ai-scripts.md` | aq-loop, aq-wiki, delegate-to-*, aq-qa, aq-hints |
| `governance` | `.understand-anything/wiki/governance.md` | Pre-commit gates, tier0 validation, repo linting |
| `configuration` | `.understand-anything/wiki/configuration.md` | Progressive disclosure, doc schema, switchboard profiles |
| `testing` | `.understand-anything/wiki/testing.md` | Test harness, inference budget, slot tests |

---

## CLI Reference

```bash
# Initial generation (first time or after forced graph refresh):
aq-wiki --init

# Differential update (after any code change — fast, git-diff based):
aq-wiki --update

# Force full regeneration (after /understand graph refresh):
aq-wiki --init --force

# Check wiki freshness before relying on it:
aq-wiki --status

# List all sections:
aq-wiki --list

# Print a section (agents: read directly or use this):
aq-wiki --section hybrid-coordinator
cat .understand-anything/wiki/switchboard.md

# Push to AIDB for semantic search:
aq-wiki --seed-aidb
```

---

## Refresh Cadence

| Event | Action |
|-------|--------|
| Any code change | `aq-wiki --update` (Step 7 DOC-UPDATE in WORKFLOW-CANON) |
| Graph refresh (`/understand`) | `aq-wiki --init --force && aq-wiki --seed-aidb` |
| Architecture questions in session | `aq-wiki --status` first, then read section |
| New subsystem added to repo | Add entry to `SUBSYSTEMS` dict in `scripts/ai/aq-wiki` |
| CI (if enabled) | `aq-wiki --update && aq-wiki --seed-aidb` |

---

## How Agents Use the Wiki

**Before reading raw source files**, check the wiki:

```bash
# Claude Code — direct read:
cat .understand-anything/wiki/hybrid-coordinator.md

# Gemini / Codex / Local — via shell tool:
aq-wiki --section hybrid-coordinator

# All agents — AIDB semantic search (after --seed-aidb):
aq-hints 'how does intent classification work' --source wiki-sections
```

The wiki is referenced in:
- `CLAUDE.md` → On-Demand Context table
- `.agent/GEMINI.md`, `.agent/CODEX.md`, `.agent/LOCAL-AGENT.md` → On-Demand Context tables
- `.agent/SKILL_INDEX.md` → `wiki-navigation` skill entry
- `.agent/WORKFLOW-CANON.md` → Step 7 DOC-UPDATE
- `config/progressive-disclosure-domains.json` → `ai-harness` and `documentation` domains

---

## AIDB Integration

After seeding (`aq-wiki --seed-aidb`), wiki sections land in the `wiki-sections` Qdrant collection.

**Prerequisite**: `wiki-sections` must be in `ALLOWED_COLLECTIONS`:

```nix
# nix/modules/core/options.nix (or wherever AIDB collections are declared)
services.aidb.allowedCollections = [
  "error-solutions"
  "best-practices"
  "skills-patterns"
  "wiki-sections"   # ADD THIS
];
```

After adding, rebuild and restart AIDB, then re-run `aq-wiki --seed-aidb`.

---

## Progressive Disclosure Integration

At `standard` and `full` levels for `ai-harness` and `documentation` domains, the progressive
disclosure system surfaces wiki section commands in the `wiki_sections` field. Agents can
consume this to know which wiki section is most relevant before loading it.

Config: `config/progressive-disclosure-domains.json` → `domains.ai-harness.disclosure.standard.wiki_sections`

---

## Relationship to understand-anything

```
/understand  (Claude Code skill)
    ↓
knowledge-graph.json  (6257 nodes, 1870 edges — source of truth)
    ↓
aq-wiki --init / --update  (aggregates node summaries → markdown)
    ↓
.understand-anything/wiki/<subsystem>.md  (agent-readable sections)
    ↓
aq-wiki --seed-aidb  (optional — pushes to Qdrant for semantic search)
```

The knowledge graph is the **single source of truth**. The wiki is a derived, browsable view.
Agents should prefer the wiki for overview/orientation and fall back to the raw graph only for
specific node/edge queries.

---

## Extending the Wiki

To add a new subsystem section:

1. Edit `scripts/ai/aq-wiki` → add entry to `SUBSYSTEMS` dict:

```python
SUBSYSTEMS = {
    ...
    "my-new-subsystem": {
        "prefix": "path/to/subsystem",
        "desc": "One-line description",
        "related_docs": ["docs/agent-guides/XX-NAME.md"],
    },
}
```

2. Run `aq-wiki --init` to generate the new section.
3. Update this file's subsystem table.
4. Run `aq-wiki --seed-aidb` to push to AIDB.

---

## Known Limitations

- **filePath truncation**: knowledge-graph.json node `filePath` fields may be truncated to ~60 chars. Prefix matching handles this gracefully.
- **Graph staleness**: wiki sections carry a `graph_generated` timestamp. `aq-wiki --status` shows `STALE` when the graph has been regenerated but wiki hasn't been refreshed.
- **AIDB collection**: `wiki-sections` must be manually added to `ALLOWED_COLLECTIONS` before seeding works (see AIDB Integration above).
- **No LLM synthesis**: wiki overview is aggregated from node summaries, not LLM-generated prose. Quality depends on understand-anything's node summary quality.
